nodes.title: 2-days Training Program On Advanced Manufacturing Technologies
nodes.summary: Click here to read the brochure Upskill in Advanced Manufacturing at IIT Jammu! Join us for an intensive 2-Day Training Program on Advanced Manufacturing Technologies at the Central Workshop, IIT Jammu on 27th–28th March 2026 .
nodes.text:
Click here to read the brochure

Upskill in Advanced Manufacturing at IIT Jammu!

Join us for an intensive 2-Day Training Program on Advanced Manufacturing Technologies at the Central Workshop, IIT Jammu on 27th–28th March 2026 . This hands-on program is designed for students, technical staff, and faculty aiming to gain industry-ready expertise in cutting-edge manufacturing processes.

What’s in Store: -
 - Master CNC Machining and Mastercam-based programming
- Hands-on exposure to Wire EDM, Water Jet Machining, and advanced CNC operations -
- Explore Additive Manufacturing including Wire Arc Additive Manufacturing (WAAM) and powder-based methods
- Learn modern Robotic Welding techniques and advanced welding processes

Who Can Participate: Polytechnic students, B.Tech/M.Tech students (Mechanical, Production, Mechatronics, Industrial Design), technical staff, and faculty.

Certification & Benefits:
 - Certificate of Completion from IIT Jammu
- Training material, workshop access, hi-tea, and lunch included
- Build practical, industry-ready skills

Duration : 2 Days | 8 Hours/Day Mode : Theory + Practical Sessions

Take the leap towards becoming a skilled professional in advanced manufacturing technologies!

Register Now: Secure your spot and elevate your skills!

nodes.text:
We extend hearty welcome to all students who have joined IIT Jammu, the fastest growing third generation IIT. IIT Jammu blends the approach of interactive and hands-on learning into its pedagogic principles. Curriculum template in the academic system of IIT Jammu has been structured to be multi-disciplinary to cater to the rapidly changing scientific and technological needs of the global community. The programs are designed to encourage students to relate academic theory to real-world practice and to collaborate with like-minded community in and out of the lecture hall.

Academic Section Website provides details of all academic programs and courses offered for you to pick and choose your track of specialisation. Our team lends support to all your academic administration issues that you may have. Please feel free meet the relevant staff and they will readily provide guidance and support so that your issues are resolved quickly.

We expect each and every one of you to contribute effectively to make IIT Jammu the first choice among students aspiring for higher education.

IIT Jammu's two-year M.Tech in VLSI Design (Executive) is a pioneering academic venture that marries the theoretical underpinnings of academia with the dynamic pragmatism of the semiconductor, sensors and AI industries. This advanced program is meticulously structured to navigate the intricate landscape of microelectronics and smart technologies, fortifying students with the skills needed to master complex integrated circuit design and intelligent system innovation. The program has one-year exit policy means after successful completion of one year of program, students are eligible to get “Post Graduate Diploma in VLSI Design”.

nodes.title: Physics Department: Outstanding Recognition for Dr Nitish's Pioneering Doctoral Thesis on Nano Architectured Porous Carbons
nodes.summary: Dr Nitish's doctoral journey was marked by distinction, accompanied by the publication of an impressive portfolio of 20 research papers. As a testament to his expertise, Dr Nitish is currently engaged in cutting-edge research on Sodium-Ion Batteries.
nodes.text:
In a significant achievement, Dr Nitish, under the guidance of Prof Rahul R Salunkhe, has been accorded well-deserved accolades for his exceptional doctoral thesis, titled "ZIF-67 Derived Nano Architectured Porous Carbons for Energy Storage Applications," during the 4th Convocation at IIT Jammu.

Dr Nitish's doctoral journey was marked by distinction, accompanied by the publication of an impressive portfolio of 20 research papers. His commitment to advancing knowledge in the field is evident through this prolific scholarly output.

As a testament to his expertise, Dr Nitish is currently engaged in cutting-edge research on Sodium-Ion Batteries. He serves as a Postdoctoral researcher at the esteemed Chalmers Institute of Technology in Sweden.

The institution extends its heartiest congratulations to Dr Nitish for this remarkable milestone and wishes him continued success in his research endeavors.

nodes.summary: Academic Affairs section is the institutional office that oversees a variety of academic programs and departments. IIT Jammu started its journey in the year 2016 with 3 UG programs and has grown now offering UG in 7 programmes, M.Tech in 8…
nodes.text:
Academic Affairs section is the institutional office that oversees a variety of academic programs and departments.

The section plays a pivotal role in advising students and assisting them as they navigate their academic pathway towards completing degree. The Academic Affairs facilitates students with a whole range of academic functions including admission, pre- registration, registration, examination & grading function and processing student requests.

The section is responsible for the implementation of the decisions taken on academic matters by the Senate.

IIT Jammu started its journey in the year 2016 with 3 UG programs and has grown now offering UG in 7 programmes, M.Tech in 8 specializations, M.Sc./MS(R) in 2 programmes and Ph.D. in 11 programmes. In addition to regular M.Tech programme IIT Jammu is also offering Executive M. Tech. for Working Professionals in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning

nodes.title: IIT Jammu
nodes.summary: IIT Jammu is pleased to announce that Burhan Ud Din Wafai, Ph.D. Chinmoy Kundu, has been selected under the prestigious TCS Research Scholarship Program (Cycle 16).

nodes.title: IIT Jammu Ph.D. scholar has been selected under the prestigious TCS Research Scholarship Program
nodes.summary: IIT Jammu is pleased to announce that Burhan Ud Din Wafai, Ph.D. Chinmoy Kundu, has been selected under the prestigious TCS Research Scholarship Program (Cycle 16).
nodes.text: IIT Jammu is pleased to announce that Burhan Ud Din Wafai, Ph.D. scholar of Dr. Ankit Dubey and Dr. Chinmoy Kundu, has been selected under the prestigious TCS Research Scholarship Program (Cycle 16). The aim of this program (TCS RSP) is to promote development and innovation to contribute to boosting the country’s technology landscape. TCS selects only one student in every cycle for this scholarship who receives a cash scholarship and contingency funds for four years, with a provision of extending the support for one more year. Further, they will also be awarded significant travel funds for international travel to attend and present their research work in international conferences and workshops. Such grants will help in strengthening the bridge between industry and IIT Jammu.

nodes.title: HOD Message
nodes.summary: Dear Recruiters, We greatly delight in extending you a warm invitation to participate in our institute's Campus Recruitment Programme. With well thought, developed core courses, the curriculum at IIT Jammu emphasizes laying a solid foundation in…

nodes.title: Message
nodes.summary: Dear Recruiters, We greatly delight in extending you a warm invitation to participate in our institute's Campus Recruitment Programme. With well thought, developed core courses, the curriculum at IIT Jammu emphasizes laying a solid foundation in…
nodes.text:
Dear Recruiters,

We greatly delight in extending you a warm invitation to participate in our institute's Campus Recruitment Programme. With well thought, developed core courses, the curriculum at IIT Jammu emphasizes laying a solid foundation in each discipline. At the same time, the choices of different elective courses going across the disciplines broaden the student's knowledge base. IIT Jammu has transformed into a Center of Excellence in technical education in just over some years to meet the growing demand for technology professionals in India and worldwide.

On behalf of the faculty and the students, I cordially invite you to the recruiting process for our students. I am assured they shall become an asset to your organization.

Happy Recruiting!

nodes.title: The Study In India (SII) programme
nodes.summary: The Study In India (SII) programme is a flagship project introduced by the Ministry of Education (MoE), Government of India. For registrations, please visit Study In India Portal
nodes.text:
The Study In India (SII) programme is a flagship project introduced by the Ministry of Education (MoE), Government of India. The Study in India portal ( https://studyinindia.gov.in/ ) was jointly launched on 18th April 2018 by the former Minister of Union External Affairs, Late Smt. Sushma Swaraj and former Minister of State for HRD, Dr Satya Pal Singh at the India Habitat Centre in New Delhi. The Study in India programme seeks to endorse India as a prime education hub for international students by inviting them to pursue their higher education in the country.

For registrations, please visit Study In India Portal

Overview of Bachelor of Science (BS) Program

The Bachelor of Science (BS) in Behavioral Sciences and
 Predictive Analytics (BSPA) is
 inherently interdisciplinary, merging two distinct but complementary fields: Behavioral
 sciences and predictive analytics. The program integrates the study of human Behavior
 with advanced data analysis techniques, providing students with a holistic understanding
 of both qualitative and quantitative dimensions of human actions and decisions. This
 unique combination addresses the need for professionals who can interpret human Behavior
 using data-driven approaches, making it relevant across various sectors such as
 healthcare, public policy, marketing, and social sciences.

The program's interdisciplinary nature equips students
 with the tools to analyze
 complex social issues using Behavioral insights and predictive models. The dual focus on
 theoretical understanding and practical application enables students to bridge the gap
 between humanities and data science, preparing them for a wide range of careers where
 both critical thinking and technical expertise are essential.

In summary, the curriculum draws from multiple academic
 disciplines, ensuring that
 graduates are well-rounded professionals capable of addressing complex societal
 challenges through innovative, interdisciplinary methods.

Core Training in Year 1 and Year 2: Strong Foundation with core courses in Behavioral Sciences, Neurosciences, Social
 Sciences, Humanities, Economics, Mathematics, Computer Programming, Data Science,
 Machine Learning, Psychology & Cognitive Sciences.

Advanced Learning in Year 3 and Year
 4 Advanced and specialisation courses in Data Science, Machine Learning, Behavioural
 Sciences, Business Strategy, Psychology, Economics, Humanities & Social Sciences,
 and Policy Making Projects, Semester-long Industry Experience, Basket of Elective
 Courses across the curriculum of IIT Jammu.

nodes.title: IIT Jammu
nodes.summary: Scholar - Department : Humanities and Social Sciences - Date, Day and Time : 7th July, 2025, Monday, 3 p.m. Seminar - Venue : North Block, Room 209 Description : The Pre-Ph.D.
nodes.text:
- Designation : Ph.D. Scholar
- Department : Humanities and Social Sciences
- Date, Day and Time : 7th July, 2025, Monday, 3 p.m. onwards
- Event : Pre-Ph.D. Seminar
- Venue : North Block, Room 209

Description : The Pre-Ph.D. Seminar discussed
 the doctoral thesis titled Beyond the Binary, Across the Spectrum: A Multimodal Reading
 of Transgender Indian Narratives that engages with oral, textual, and visual narratives
 to examine the diverse expressions of transgender identities in India. Positioned within
 India’s socio-cultural and linguistic contexts, the study interrogates binary
 gender norms and highlights how marginalized voices articulate resistance and
 self-definition.

The research explores podcasts, literature, cinema, webcomics,
 and photo-textual art to trace how questions of gender intersect with caste, class, and
 region. It underscores the resilience and creativity of transgender individuals in
 reimagining identity and generating inclusive cultural discourses.

Bringing together perspectives from literature, media, and
 queer/trans studies, this interdisciplinary work contributes to widening the field of
 transgender scholarship in India while advocating pathways toward a more equitable and
 inclusive society.

nodes.title: IIT Jammu
nodes.summary: The Humanities and Social Sciences Department, at IIT Jammu offers a five year PhD programme. The Department seeks highly motivated and enthusiastic scholars willing to inculcate a robust research methodology and contribute to the Department’s…

nodes.title: PhD Programme
nodes.summary: The Humanities and Social Sciences Department, at IIT Jammu offers a five year PhD programme. The Department seeks highly motivated and enthusiastic scholars willing to inculcate a robust research methodology and contribute to the Department’s…
nodes.text:
The Humanities and Social Sciences Department, at IIT Jammu offers a five year PhD programme. Students applying for this Programme must have cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) in the relevant subject. The Department seeks highly motivated and enthusiastic scholars willing to inculcate a robust research methodology and contribute to the Department’s fields of research

The potential topics for PhD specializations offered by the department are Cognitive Science, Neuroscience, Experimental Psychology - strong programming skills are required, preferably in MATLAB or Python; Tribal Literature, Subaltern Studies; Ethics, Philosophy of Science, Western Epistemology; Industrial and Financial economics, Agricultural Economics, Development Economics, Financial, Environmental and Institutional Economics- Expected to have basic understanding of Mathematics and Statistics; Applied Psychology/ Psychology/ Social Psychology/ Gender, Familiarity with Quantitative/Qualitative data analysis, SPSS.

Please refer to the institute website for the eligibility criteria in the specific domain of specialization.

nodes.title: B.Tech. in Mechanical
nodes.summary: Engineering The department offers a B.Tech. program in Mechanical Engineering.
nodes.text:
Engineering

The department offers a B.Tech. program in Mechanical
 Engineering. This program
 commenced in 2016 with a sanctioned strength of 30 students, which has now been
 increased to 40. We offer many different specialization-related courses and minor
 programs. Beginning from their third year, students work on B.Tech. projects to hone
 their analytical abilities and acquire practical experience. The curriculum is
 designed to expose undergraduate students to both theoretical and practical aspects
 of their chosen discipline.

nodes.title: M.Tech in Thermal and Energy
nodes.summary: programme in Thermal and Energy Systems Engineering started in 2020 and is designed for students with a background related to mechanical engineering. Some of the focus areas include energy conversion systems and their fuels, renewable energy, HVAC,…
nodes.text:
Systems

The M.Tech. programme in Thermal and Energy Systems
 Engineering started in 2020 and
 is designed for students with a background related to mechanical engineering. The
 objective is to provide students with an organized curriculum consisting of courses
 designed to enhance their capability to analyse and design innovative systems
 requiring knowledge in thermal and energy sciences. Some of the focus areas include
 energy conversion systems and their fuels, renewable energy, HVAC, nuclear energy
 and fluid dynamics. Along with a practical orientation and fundamental knowledge,
 the students also learn to simulate various fluid, thermal and energy systems using
 different computational tools; this enhances their skill levels and makes them more
 industry-ready.

nodes.title: Ph.D. in
nodes.summary: Mechanical Engineering The Department of Mechanical Engineering offers a terminal degree program, the Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.), which was launched in 2018. This program, in which the research scholar’s financial needs are served by means of a…
nodes.text:
Mechanical Engineering

The Department of Mechanical Engineering offers a
 terminal degree program, the Doctor
 of Philosophy (Ph.D.), which was launched in 2018. This program is focused on three
 broad areas of study: manufacturing, design, and thermo-fluid sciences. This
 program, in which the research scholar’s financial needs are served by means of a
 stipend, consists of a flexible curriculum of coursework relevant to the area of
 study and research. These courses are chosen by the student in agreement with the
 research adviser, followed by a significant emphasis on research culminating in a
 dissertation. This PhD program is part of our effort to foster a world-class
 technology and knowledge-driven society by training students who have a desire and
 orientation towards a deeper understanding of scientific phenomena.

nodes.summary: Master of Technology with specialization in Biomedical Devices. The program aims to provide students with a comprehensive understanding of the field of biomedical engineering and medical devices, including advanced training to make them…

nodes.title: M. Tech in Biosciences and Bioengineering with  Specialization in Medical Devices
nodes.summary: Master of Technology with specialization in Biomedical Devices. The program aims to provide students with a comprehensive understanding of the field of biomedical engineering and medical devices, including advanced training to make them…
nodes.text:
The field of biomedical engineering has seen tremendous growth over the past few decades, with advancements in technology leading to the development of new medical devices, diagnostic tools, and therapeutic interventions. At the same time, the realm of tissue engineering and regenerative medicine in healthcare is rapidly expanding, offering new opportunities to improve patient care and outcomes. To address the need for professionals who can bridge the gap between technology and healthcare, the Department of Biosciences and Bioengineering, IIT Jammu proposes to offer a two-year postgraduate program viz. Master of Technology with specialization in Biomedical Devices. The program will be a trans-disciplinary one, with active participation of faculty besides from the core department, BSBE, from the departments of electrical engineering, mechanical engineering, chemical engineering and materials engineering. The program aims to provide students with a comprehensive understanding of the field of biomedical engineering and medical devices, including advanced training to make them Industry-ready by inclusion of industry-specific component. Students will be equipped with advanced technical knowledge and skills to address real-world problems in the field of medical devices and biomedical engineering which shall prepare them for careers in research and development, the healthcare industry, and academia. The program also aims to train students to apply their knowledge and skills to develop innovative solutions that enhance patient care, improve healthcare outcomes, and advance medical science.
 [Apply Now](https://iitjammu.ac.in/pg-admissions) Popular Courses Section End

nodes.title: IIT Jammu
nodes.summary: In this specialization, the under graduate students have opportunity to study core and elective courses on fluid mechanics and open channel hydraulics, engineering hydrology, river engineering, design of hydraulic structures and water resources…
nodes.text:
The Water Resources Engineering program at Indian Institute of Technology, Jammu, aims to provide support to undergraduate and PhD students to have the opportunity to understand and practically visualize the fluid mechanics and open channel hydraulics principles. Water Resources laboratory has hydrology equipments like rainfall-runoff simulator, rain gauge, pan evaporimeter, infiltrometers and many fluid mechanics apparatus to understand the basic principles of flow behaviour in pipe flow and open channel flows.  In this lab, research is carried in the diversified areas such as climate change, hydrological and hydraulic modelling, river engineering works and satellite remote sensing for water resources applications. In this specialization, the under graduate students have opportunity to study core and elective courses on fluid mechanics and open channel hydraulics, engineering hydrology, river engineering, design of hydraulic structures and water resources management.

Research Areas:
 - Hydrological and Hydraulic Modelling
- Contaminant Transport and Ground Water Hydrology
- Climate Change
- Crop Modelling
- River Dynamics and River Engineering
- Experimental Hydraulics
- Satellite Remote Sensing

nodes.summary: Shafarevich, Basic Algebraic Geometry 1: Varieties in Projective Spaces, Springer-Verlag Berlin Heidelberg, 2013. William Fulton, Algebraic Curves: An Introduction to Algebraic Geometry, Addison-Wesley, 1989.
nodes.text:
Singular and non-singular points, tangent space, power series expansion, proper- ties of non-singular points, normal varieties.

Divisors, linear system of a divisor, divisors on curves, degree of a divisor on curves, Bezout’s theorem.

Differential forms, module of differentials, regular differential p-forms, examples and applications of differential forms, the Riemann-Roch theorem for curves.

References:

1. I. R. Shafarevich, Basic Algebraic Geometry 1: Varieties in Projective Spaces, Springer-Verlag Berlin Heidelberg, 2013.

2. Joe Harris, Algebraic Geometry: A First Course, Springer Graduate Texts in Mathematics 133, Springer-Verlag New York, 1992.

3. William Fulton, Algebraic Curves: An Introduction to Algebraic Geometry, Addison-Wesley, 1989.

nodes.title: Master in Science
nodes.summary: (Physics) program is to prepare a talent pool of manpower by inducting them right after their bachelor degree and provide them quality education with sound fundamentals to contribute effectively in these rapidly changing times, and in addition train…
nodes.text: The main objective of the M.Sc. (Physics) program is to prepare a talent pool of manpower by inducting them right after their bachelor degree and provide them quality education with sound fundamentals to contribute effectively in these rapidly changing times, and in addition train the students to conduct research in a specific stream of interdisciplinary physics. At the end of the second semester, a student will opt for a stream and allocation will be made as per the availability of the seats and the Department policy. All the admitted candidates irrespective of their streams will undergo a common curriculum for the first two semesters that will cover the core physics courses which form the basis for the courses in the interdisciplinary areas.

structure.summary: IIT Jammu Admissions. Covers: B.Tech Admission via JEE Advanced and JoSAA, M.Tech Admission via GATE, Ph.D Admission. 15 sub-sections.
structure.text: Category: Admissions. Contains 15 pages of information.

nodes.title: B.Tech Admission via JEE Advanced and JoSAA
nodes.summary: B.Tech admission at IIT Jammu: Step 1: Clear JEE Advanced (conducted by IITs annually, usually in June). Step 3: Seat allotment based on JEE Advanced rank + category.
nodes.text:
B.Tech admission at IIT Jammu:
Step 1: Clear JEE Advanced (conducted by IITs annually, usually in June).
Step 2: Register on JoSAA (josaa.nic.in) and fill branch preferences.
Step 3: Seat allotment based on JEE Advanced rank + category.
Step 4: Accept allotted seat and pay acceptance fee.
Step 5: Report to campus with documents.
Reservations: OBC-NCL 27%, SC 15%, ST 7.5%, EWS 10%, PwD 5%.
Approximate General category closing ranks: CSE 2500-3500, EE 4000-5500, ME 5000-7000, CE 8000-11000, M&C 3500-5000.

nodes.title: M.Tech Admission via GATE
nodes.summary: Stipend: Teaching Assistantship Rs 12,400/month for GATE-qualified students. 11 M.Tech specializations available across departments.
nodes.text:
M.Tech admission at IIT Jammu:
Requirement: Valid GATE score (no cutoff published; relative ranking used).
Process: Apply online → shortlist by GATE score → written test/interview at IITJ.
Stipend: Teaching Assistantship Rs 12,400/month for GATE-qualified students.
Sponsored: Minimum 2 years work experience, employer-sponsored, GATE not required.
Eligibility: B.E./B.Tech with 60% marks (55% for SC/ST).
11 M.Tech specializations available across departments.

nodes.title: Ph.D Admission
nodes.summary: Fellowship: Institute fellowship Rs 31,000/month (JRF), Rs 35,000/month (SRF). PMRF available: Rs 70,000-80,000/month for exceptional scholars.
nodes.text:
Ph.D admission at IIT Jammu:
Two sessions: January and August, rolling admissions.
Eligibility: M.Tech/M.E./M.Sc/B.Tech (for direct PhD) with 60% marks.
Selection: Written test + interview at IIT Jammu campus.
Fellowship: Institute fellowship Rs 31,000/month (JRF), Rs 35,000/month (SRF).
PMRF available: Rs 70,000-80,000/month for exceptional scholars.
Foreign nationals: Separate admissions portal.

nodes.title: IIT Jammu
nodes.summary: All communication related to tenders is conducted solely through the Institute’s official email i.e., procurement@iitjammu.ac.in IIT Jammu does not communicate or solicit any information or payments related to tenders via WhatsApp, phone calls,…
nodes.text:
Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu) does not charge any fee in connection with tenders, except for the Earnest Money Deposit (EMD) and the Performance Bank Guarantee (PBG), as explicitly stated in the official tender documents. All communication related to tenders is conducted solely through the Institute’s official email i.e., procurement@iitjammu.ac.in

IIT Jammu does not communicate or solicit any information or payments related to tenders via WhatsApp, phone calls, personal emails, or any other unofficial platforms. Any such communication should be considered unauthorized and potentially fraudulent. Stakeholders are advised to remain vigilant and report any suspicious activity to the Institute immediately.

nodes.text:
The interested applicants are invited to appear in a interview through Video Conferencing (VC) mode (the invite link will be sent by email on the date of interview) to be held at IIT Jammu on October 08, 2023 for the post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) to work on the R&D project titled “ Efficient decoding and explicit determination of basic parameters of linear codes associated to Grassmann and flag varieties over finite fields ” sanctioned by Science and Engineering Research Board (SERB), New Delhi. The JRF will be appointed initially for one year (on contract) and based on the performance the position can be considered for extension of one more year at the end of first year

Application Process: All the applicants interested to participate in the selection process (through VC mode) are advised to email their detailed bio-data along with scanned copy of all supporting documents such as educational certificates from 10th onwards, proof of date of birth, proof of experience (if any), e.g., summaries of projects done and experience certificate of previous projects, and certificate of qualifying national test like NET/GATE etc., to : prasant.singh@iitjammu.ac.in latest by October 06, 2023.

The interested applicants are invited to appear in a walk-in interview through offline (additional details will be provided to the shortlisted applicants) to be held at IIT Jammu on July 31st, 2023 12 August 2023 for the post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) to work on the R&D project titled “ Asymmetric Remote C (sp3 )-H functionalization’s by intercepting the Radical Relays ” sanctioned by Science and Engineering Research Board (SERB), New Delhi. Walk-in interview date (offline): July 31st, 2023 12 August 2023

Application Process: All the applicants interested to participate in the selection process (through online/offline mode) are advised to email their detailed biodata along with scanned copy of all supporting documents such as educational certificates from 10th onwards, proof of date of birth, proof of experience (if any), e.g., summaries of projects done and experience certificate of previous projects, and certificate of qualifying national test like NET/GATE etc., to: guru.ramani@iitjammu.ac.in latest by 27th July 2023 08 August 2023, 17:00 hrs. The applicants should clearly mention their interview mode of choice (online/offline) and the shortlisted candidates will be informed through email by 28th July 2023 9 August 2023, 17:00 hrs..

nodes.title: Advt. No.: IITJMU/R&C/2023/A-29
nodes.summary: Application Process: Eligible candidates may submit an application to Dr. The application email should contain the subject “RA Application”.
nodes.text:
Applications are invited for a post of Research Associate (RA) to work on the R&D project titled " Construction of permutation polynomials, and computation of generalized differential and boomerang uniformities of some classes of functions over finite fields, " sanctioned by the Science and Engineering Research Board (SERB), Govt. of India, for a period of three years. The RA will be initially appointed for a period of one year and may be extended for a maximum of three years depending on performance, which will be evaluated at the completion of each year. The post is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project.

Application Process: Eligible candidates may submit an application to Dr. Sartaj Ul Hasan ( sartaj.hasan@iitjammu.ac.in ). The application email should contain the subject “RA Application”. The application should include a cover letter, CV of the applicant and two recommendation letters. The last date for applications has now been extended until May 15, 2023. Only short-listed candidates will be contacted by email. The interview will be in online mode, the date of which will be notified later.

nodes.summary: Applications are invited for a short-term project position (2-months, under Scientific Social Responsibility head) in a research project funded by SERB The interested applicants are invited to apply for a short-term project (2-months only) that is…
nodes.text:
Applications are invited for a short-term project position (2-months, under Scientific Social Responsibility head) in a research project funded by SERB

The interested applicants are invited to apply for a short-term project (2-months only) that is funded by the SERB under scientific social responsibility scheme. The applicant will execute work on the R&D project titled “ Asymmetric Remote C(sp3 )-H functionalizations by intercepting the Radical Relays ” sanctioned by the SERB, New Delhi. The duration of the project is strictly for 2-months and can’t be extendable . The shortlisted applicants will be contacted and provided with additional details. The due line for the submitting their applications is March 23rd 2023.

Application Process: All the applicants interested to participate in the selection process are advised to email their detailed biodata along with scanned copy of all supporting documents such as educational certificates from 10th onwards, proof of date of birth, proof of experience (if any) to: guru.ramani@iitjammu.ac.in latest by 23rd March 2023, 17:00 hrs . The shortlisted candidates will be informed through email by 25 th Mar 2023, 17:00 hrs . and will be called for offline interview (tentatively on 01 Apr 2023 ).

Applications are invited to appear in a interview through Video Conferencing (VC) mode (the invite link will be sent by email on the date of interview) to be held at IIT Jammu on February 7, 2023 for the post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) to work on the R&D project titled “ Binomial Edge Ideals ” sanctioned by Science and Engineering Research Board (SERB), New Delhi. The JRF will be appointed till 23 Dec 2023 (on contract).

Application Process: All the applicants interested to participate in the selection process (through VC mode) are advised to email their detailed bio-data along with scanned copy of all supporting documents such as educational certificates from 10th onwards, proof of date of birth, proof of experience (if any), e.g., summaries of projects done and experience certificate of previous projects, and certificate of qualifying national test like NET/JRF etc., to : ajay.kumar@iitjammu.ac.in latest by February 6, 2023 . Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted by email.

The interview will be in online mode, the date of which will be notified later.

nodes.summary: Walk-in interview (through Video Conferencing mode) on April 22, 2022 to work as Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position in a research project funded by SERB The interested applicants are invited to appear in a walk-in interview through Video…
nodes.text:
Walk-in interview (through Video Conferencing mode) on April 22, 2022 to work as Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position in a research project funded by SERB

The interested applicants are invited to appear in a walk-in interview through Video Conferencing (VC) mode (the invite link will be sent by email on the date of interview) to be held at IIT Jammu on Apr 22, 2022 for the post of full-time Junior Research Fellow (JRF) to work on the R&D project titled “ High Valent Emissive Ni(III/IV) Complexes for Organic Transformation and Photoredox Catalysis ” sanctioned by Science and Engineering Research Board (SERB), New Delhi. The JRF will be appointed initially for one year (on contract) or up to the duration of the project, whichever is earlier.

Walk-in interview date (through VC mode): April 22, 2022

Application Process All the applicants interested to participate in the selection process (through VC mode) are advised to email their detailed bio-data along with scanned copy of all supporting documents such as educational certificates from 10th onwards, proof of date of birth, proof of experience (if any), e.g., summaries of projects done and experience certificate of previous projects, and certificate of qualifying national test like NET/GATE etc., to: amlan.pal@iitjammu.ac.in latest by April 20, 2022.

The interested applicants are invited to appear in a walk-in interview through Video Conferencing (VC) mode (the invite link will be sent by email on the date of interview) to be held at IIT Jammu on August 07, 2024 for the post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Project Assistant (PA) to work on the R&D project titled “ Analysis of NIST’s Lattice based PQC schemes for Digital Signatures ” sanctioned by Defence Research and Development Organization (DRDO). The JRF and PA will be appointed on a contractual basis for a period of one year or until the end of the project, whichever is earlier.

Application Process: All the applicants interested to participate in the selection process (through VC mode) are advised to email their detailed bio-data along with scanned copy of all supporting documents such as educational certificates from 10th onwards, proof of date of birth, proof of experience (if any), e.g., summaries of projects done and experience certificate of previous projects, and certificate of qualifying national test like NET/GATE etc., to: sumit.pandey@iitjammu.ac.in latest by August 01, 2024.

nodes.title: Advt. No.: IITJMU/R&C/RP00141/2024/A-01
nodes.summary: Application Process: Eligible candidates may submit an application to Dr. The application email should contain the subject “ RA Application ”.
nodes.text:
Applications are invited for a post of Research Associate (RA) to work on the R&D project titled " Construction of permutation polynomials, and computation of generalized differential and boomerang uniformities of some classes of functions over finite fields ," sanctioned by the Science and Engineering Research Board (SERB), Govt. of India, for a period of three years. The RA will be initially appointed for a period of one year and may be extended for a maximum of one more year depending on performance, which will be evaluated at the completion of each year. The post is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project.

Application Process: Eligible candidates may submit an application to Dr. Sartaj Ul Hasan ( sartaj.hasan@iitjammu.ac.in ). The application email should contain the subject “ RA Application ”. The application should include a cover letter and CV of the applicant. The last date for applications has been extended to 31.03.2024 . Only short-listed candidates will be contacted by email. The interview will be in online mode, the date of which will be notified later.

nodes.title: Advt. No.: IITJMU/R&C/Advt/2022/34
nodes.summary: The positions are for a maximum period of 2 years or till the duration of the project (whichever is earlier) and extendable based on the performance Project Principal Investigators: Prof. Detailed Advertisement (Revised on 01.01.2024)
nodes.text:
Applications are invited for the following project staff positions on a rolling basis at the Indian Institute of Technology, Jammu for the project titled “ A simulation and emulation oriented cyber testbed for training and defense in cybersecurity” (RP0072) and Analyzing Vulnerabilities in Applications and Device Drivers in Linux and Windows OS Platforms Using Symbolic Execution (RP0074) . The projects are focused on cybersecurity, formal program analysis, software testing, and high-end computing-intensive testbed development suitable for cybersecurity applications. This is a rolling advertisement . Applications will be shortlisted and informed every alternate Monday. The interviews will be conducted on the following Wednesday. The positions are for a maximum period of 2 years or till the duration of the project (whichever is earlier) and extendable based on the performance

Project Principal Investigators: Prof. Manoj Singh Gaur and Dr.Shaifu Gupta.

Detailed Advertisement (Revised on 01.01.2024)

nodes.title: Advt. No.: IITJMU/RC/RP00141/A-129
nodes.summary: Application Process: Eligible candidates may submit an application to Dr. The application email should contain the subject “RA Application”.
nodes.text:
Applications are invited from Indian Citizens for a post of Research Associate (RA) to work on the R&D project titled " Construction of permutation polynomials, and computation of generalized differential and boomerang uniformities of some classes of functions over finite fields ," sanctioned by the Science and Engineering Research Board (SERB), Govt. of India. The RA will be appointed for a period of one year or before or until the completion of the project, whichever is earlier. The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project.

Application Process:

Eligible candidates may submit an application to Dr. Sartaj Ul Hasan ( sartaj.hasan@iitjammu.ac.in ). The application email should contain the subject “RA Application”. The application should include a cover letter, CV of the applicant and two recommendation letters. The last date for applications is August 15, 2025 . Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted by email. The interview will be in online mode, the date of which will be notified later.

nodes.summary: The interested applicants are invited to appear in a walk-in interview through Video Conferencing (VC) mode (the invite will be sent by email one day before the date of interview) to be held at IIT Jammu for the post of Quality Assurance Engineer to…
nodes.text:
The interested applicants are invited to appear in a walk-in interview through Video Conferencing (VC) mode (the invite will be sent by email one day before the date of interview) to be held at IIT Jammu for the post of Quality Assurance Engineer to work on the Third Party Quality Assurance (TPQA) of civil works of AIIMS Jammu project in Vijaypur, Jammu. The staff will be appointed for two and a half years (on contract) or up to the duration of the project, whichever is earlier. Initially the contract will be given for a period of six months, which will be extended up to, the duration of the project based on the satisfactory performance.

Application Process/Submission: All the applicants interested to participate in the selection process (through VC mode) are advised to email their detailed bio-data along with scanned copy of all supporting documents such as educational certificates from 10th class onward, proof of experience (if any), e.g., summaries of projects done and experience certificate of previous projects to: tpqa.aiims.jammu@gmail.com latest by January 15th, 2022.

Detailed Advertisement

nodes.summary: Last date of online application submission: Monday, 10th January 2022 For online application submission please visit: apply.iitjammu.ac.in and select the tab Contract Staff to apply. IITJmu/R&C/Advt/2021/27 for the post of VRITIKA Research…
nodes.text:
Inviting applications for Vritika Research Internship

Applications are invited from interested candidates for 02 Research Internship positions to work under the VRITIKA event titled “ Numerical investigation on the behaviour of geosynthetics-reinforced embankment under dynamic impact force of rockfall ” sanctioned by Accelerate Vigyan, SERB. The internship students will develop numerical modelling skills while investigating effective landslide mitigation methods. The event will be conducted through offline mode for a duration of eight weeks at IIT Jammu.


Last date of online application submission: Monday, 10th January 2022

For online application submission please visit: apply.iitjammu.ac.in and select the tab Contract Staff to apply.
 - Update Advertisement No. IITJmu/R&C/Advt/2021/27 for the post of VRITIKA Research Internship is hereby withdrawn due to administrative reasons., Kindly refer Notification

nodes.text:
Walk-in interview (through Video Conferencing mode) on January 3rd , 2022 to work as Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position in a research project funded by SERB

The interested applicants are invited to appear in a walk-in interview through Video Conferencing (VC) mode (the invite link will be sent by email on the date of interview) to be held at IIT Jammu on January 3rd , 2022 for the post of full-time Junior Research Fellow (JRF) to work on the R&D project titled “ High Valent Emissive Ni(III/IV) Complexes for Organic Transformation and Photoredox Catalysis ” sanctioned by Science and Engineering Research Board (SERB), New Delhi. The JRF will be appointed initially for one year (on contract) or up to the duration of the project, whichever is earlier.

Application Process: All the applicants interested to participate in the selection process (through VC mode) are advised to email their detailed bio-data along with scanned copy of all supporting documents such as educational certificates from 10th onwards, proof of date of birth, proof of experience (if any), e.g., summaries of projects done and experience certificate of previous projects, and certificate of qualifying national test like NET/GATE etc., to: amlan.pal@iitjammu.ac.in latest by December 30, 2021.

The JRF will be appointed initially for one year (on contract) or up to the duration of the project , whichever is earlier.

Application Process: All the applicants interested to participate in the selection process (through online/offline mode) are advised to email their detailed biodata along with scanned copy of all supporting documents such as educational certificates from 10th onwards, proof of date of birth, proof of experience (if any), e.g., summaries of projects done and experience certificate of previous projects, and certificate of qualifying national test like NET/GATE etc., to: guru.ramani@iitjammu.ac.in latest by December 25th 2021, 17:00 hrs.

nodes.text:
Walk-in interview (through Video Conferencing mode) on December 20, 2021 to work as Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position in a research project funded by SERB

The interested applicants are invited to appear in a walk-in interview through Video Conferencing (VC) mode (the invite link will be sent by email on the date of interview) to be held at IIT Jammu on December 20, 2021 for the post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) to work on the R&D project titled “ Dembowski-Ostrom polynomials derived from Dickson polynomials over finite fields ” sanctioned by Science and Engineering Research Board (SERB), New Delhi. The JRF will be appointed for a period of about three months (on contract) from December 21, 2021 to March 31, 2022 subject to extension of the project.

Application Process: All the applicants interested to participate in the selection process (through VC mode) are advised to email their detailed bio-data along with scanned copy of all supporting documents such as educational certificates from 10th onwards, proof of date of birth, proof of experience (if any), e.g., summaries of projects done and experience certificate of previous projects, and certificate of qualifying national test like NET/GATE etc., to : sartaj.hasan@iitjammu.ac.in latest by December 19, 2021.

nodes.text: Applications are invited from interested candidates for one post of Junior Research Fellow to work on the R&D project titled “ Investigations on thermal-hydraulic instabilities and heat transfer deterioration in a supercritical fluid system ” sanctioned by Science and Engineering Research Board (SERB), New Delhi. The post requires the candidate to work with the principle investigator, Dr. Goutam Dutta and co-investigator Prof. P. K. Vijayan. The JRF will be appointed initially for one year (on contract) and his\her services can be extended for next year based on the performance review. There is a possibility to get enrolled for the Ph.D. programme in IIT Jammu later on provided the eligibility criteria set by the IIT Jammu is full filled and the candidate is recommended by the Ph.D. selection committee.

IIT Jammu invites online applications from qualified Indian Nationals for filling up the post of Junior Engineer (Electrical) on the contract basis.


Remuneration of up to Rs 42000 PM based on qualifications. The salary shall be remitted by the hired manpower agency M/s SAI to the hired service staff.

Educational Qualifications:

(i) Bachelor’s Degree or equivalent in Electrical Engineering from a recognized university/Institute with at least 60% marks in the qualifying degree plus 02 years of relevant experience. OR Three-year Diploma in Electrical Engineering from a recognized university/Institute (after 10+2) with at least 60% marks in the qualifying degree plus 03 years of relevant experience.

(ii) Preference will be given to those who have work experience in sub-stations, HT/LT Panels etc.

(iii) Expertise in using Electrical software relevant to the job profile.

nodes.title: FAQ
nodes.summary: By Air: IIT Jammu is around 17 km away from Jammu Airport. IIT Jammu is around 13 km away from Jammu Railway Station.

nodes.title: Frequently Asked Questions (updated on June 14, 2024)
nodes.summary: By Air: IIT Jammu is around 17 km away from Jammu Airport. IIT Jammu is around 13 km away from Jammu Railway Station.
nodes.text:
- Where is IIT Jammu Located? The Indian Institute of Technology Jammu is located on the north side of Jammu city. The campus is situated on lush green land of Jagti village en-route to Katra via NH-44.
- How to reach IIT Jammu? You can reach IIT Jammu by air, rail or road. By Air: IIT Jammu is around 17 km away from Jammu Airport. From Jammu Airport, plenty of auto rickshaws and prepaid taxis are available to reach the IIT Jammu Jagti campus. By Train: Jammu is a railway hub connected to many cities through trains. IIT Jammu is around 13 km away from Jammu Railway Station. From Jammu Railway Station, you can take a bus going to Katra which will drop you in front of the IIT Jammu Jagti Campus or you can take a prepaid taxi or auto rickshaw to reach the campus. By Bus: IIT Jammu is around 12 km away from Jammu Bus stand. From the Bus Stand, you can take a bus going to Katra which will drop you in front of the IIT Jammu Jagti Campus. Alternatively, you can take a matador, three-wheeler, or taxi to reach IIT Jammu Jagti Campus. Note:- Pre-Paid SIM cards from other states do not work in J&K. There are no public phone booths on the campus. You may get a postpaid connection before reaching Jammu.
- How is the climatic condition at IIT Jammu? The Jammu lies 302m above the sea level. In Jammu, the climate is warm and temperate. According to Köppen and Geiger, this climate is classified as Cwa. Jammu, like the rest of north-western India, features a humid subtropical climate, with summer temperatures reaching 46 °C (115 °F), and temperatures in the winter months occasionally falling below 4 °C (39 °F). June is the hottest month, while January is the coldest month. Please bring a good quality winter jacket/sweater along with gloves and headcap for the winters. You may also bring an umbrella.
- Do Students need to come to the campus for classwork? Yes, students need to attend the classwork physically.
- Which UG Programs are offered by IIT Jammu for undergraduate students & number of seats in each program? For the UG programs offered from IIT Jammu & number of seats in each program kindly visit the link https://iitjammu.ac.in/ug-admissions
- How many departments are there in IIT Jammu? There are Eleven departments in IIT Jammu. 1. Department of Bio Sciences and Bio Engineering 2. Department of Chemical Engineering 3. Department of Chemistry. 4. Department of Civil Engineering. 5. Department of Computer Science & Engineering. 6. Department of Electrical Engineering. 7. Department of Humanities and Social Sciences 8. Department of Materials Engineering. 9. Department of Mathematics. 10. Department of Mechanical Engineering. 11. Department of Physics.
- What is the UG fee structure at IIT Jammu? For fee details, visit the link https://iitjammu.ac.in/fee
- Does IIT Jammu provide scholarships/financial assistance to the UG Students? The Institute offers the following scholarships to undergraduate students Institute UG Scholarship Institute Merit-cum-Means Schola

nodes.title: Contract-Project Staff
nodes.summary: Our application system for Contract/Project Staff positions is completely online. Candidate must submit a fresh application for a particular round or against an advertisement to be considered in that round/advertisement itself.
nodes.text:
Note: Starting with August 05, 2019, all logins shall be cleared due to maintenance and candidates will not be able to access previously submitted applications.  
All Contract Staff / Project Staff / JRF / SRF / Graduate Intern positions advertised are listed below.

Our application system for Contract/Project Staff positions is completely online. Applications submitted through IIT Jammu online portal or as advertised shall only be considered.

Please read the instructions carefully before you get started

General Instructions for online submission of application

Step 1: Please read detailed advertisement first for important announcements and then visit Application Portal using the link provided and click Login/Apply button under the tab Contract Staff to apply. New users will have to register first using a valid email address. This email address cannot be changed later, therefore, it is recommended to register using your personal email id.

Step 2: Once registered, please activate your login and fill out the required information on the application portal. You are required to upload the following as attachments:
 - A clear JPEG, JPG or PNG image of yourself.
- A clear JPEG, JPG or PNG image of signature.
- Clear copies of certificates of all educational qualifications submitted starting at the secondary examination level (in separate PDF files)
- Category Certificate (as applicable)
- Experience Certificate (as applicable)
- Additional Information (if any)

Note:
 - For Contract/Project Staff positions, you must provide details of secondary examination or equivalent, senior secondary examination or equivalent, and all other educational qualifications as prescribed in the detailed advertisement. Applications with incomplete or incorrect details, shall not be considered for further processing.
- Each attachment file cannot be more than 2 MB in size. All attachments must be uploaded in a separate PDF file format only. Details must be clearly visible on all attachments uploaded.
- Please use portrait mode for scanning documents as far as possible for transcripts/grade sheets of all educational qualifications - a page or image displayed in portrait mode is taller than it is wide.
- The application submission process has evolved, and it is a simple process. Do not keep session idle for more than 15 minutes and keep saving information provided. Please use a stable internet connection.
- You may save the application and submit later at any point in time. However, if you created the application in one round or against an advertisement and want to submit in the next round/advertisement, due to regular portal enhancements this is not allowed. Candidate must submit a fresh application for a particular round or against an advertisement to be considered in that round/advertisement itself.
- No interim communication shall be entertained about the status of the submitted application
- For any technical query regarding submission of application, please contact :

nodes.title: PG Certificate in AI-Enabled IoT & Embedded Systems
nodes.summary: PG Certificate in AI-Enabled IoT & Embedded Systems Programme Structure: Modules: Embedded Systems Basics IoT System Design AI & Machine Learning Essentials AI on the Edge Tools & Platforms Project Ideas Program Highlights Prestigious PG Certificate…
nodes.text:
PG Certificate in AI-Enabled IoT & Embedded Systems Programme Structure: Modules:

Embedded Systems Basics IoT System Design AI & Machine Learning Essentials AI on the Edge Tools & Platforms Project Ideas Program Highlights

Prestigious PG Certificate Receive a highly regarded PG Certificate from IIT Jammu

Advanced, Industry-Aligned Curriculum Build expertise in IoT architecture, embedded systems, AI & ML fundamentals, and edge AI implementation using real-world tools and platforms.

Hands-On Hardware Experience Work directly with the included hardware kit to prototype, test, and deploy AI-powered IoT applications.

Learn from IIT Jammu Faculty & Industry Leaders Gain insights from accomplished IIT Jammu faculty and industry professionals with deep experience in embedded systems, IoT, AI, and applied research.

Capstone Project Apply your learning to practical projects such as smart homes, AI-driven healthcare wearables, industrial IoT solutions, or smart agriculture systems.

Industry-Standard Tools & Platforms Develop proficiency in tools like Arduino IDE, STM32Cube, PlatformIO, Node-RED, TensorFlow Lite, and leading cloud IoT platforms including Google Cloud, AWS, and Microsoft Azure.

Optional Campus Immersion Attend a 2-day on-campus experience at IIT Jammu for lab exposure, peer networking, and direct faculty engagement.

Career-Focused Skill Development Build the technical competence and confidence required for roles in IoT, embedded systems, edge AI, and intelligent device ecosystems.

Learning Outcome

Build End-to-End Connected Systems Apply embedded systems principles, IoT architecture, and AI integration to design and develop fully functional smart devices and automated solutions. Analyze and Process IoT Data Collect, preprocess, and interpret data from sensors and connected devices to generate actionable insights for informed and intelligent decision-making. Develop Edge AI Solutions Deploy machine learning models on resource-constrained devices while optimizing for efficiency, performance, and real-time responsiveness. Solve Complex Real-World Problems Design and implement practical solutions addressing real-world challenges across healthcare, agriculture, industry, and smart environments.

Execute Capstone Projects with Impact Demonstrate the capability to plan, prototype, and deliver fully operational AI-enabled IoT solutions from concept through implementation.

Integrate Hardware and Software Effectively Combine microcontrollers, communication protocols, and AI workflows to build systems that operate seamlessly in real-world conditions.

Adapt to Emerging Technologies Leverage your knowledge of AI, IoT, and embedded systems to explore, innovate, and implement solutions within evolving technological landscapes.

Governing Committee: A dedicated governing committee composed of IIT Jammu faculty and industry experts ensures that this program meets IIT Jammu’s academic standards and maintains real-world industry relevance.

Eligibi

nodes.title: PG Certificate in Building Professional Agentic AI Applications with AIOps
nodes.summary: Program Overview This program focuses on professional designing, building, and deploying agentic AI applications —AI systems that act autonomously , coordinate across tools, and operate reliably in production environments using AIOps. Duration : 7…
nodes.text:
Program Overview

This program focuses on professional designing, building, and deploying agentic AI applications —AI systems that act autonomously , coordinate across tools, and operate reliably in production environments using AIOps.

Duration : 7 Months

Contact Hours : 130

Applications Built : 10+ with live URLs

Campus Immersion : Optional

Industry & Admission Partner : Futurense Technologies

Program Structure

Months 1–2: Agent Foundations & RAG

Module 1: Agent Foundations (No-Code First)
 - Agent architectures (ReAct, Plan-Execute)
- Tool calling and memory systems
- Workflow design using n8n
- Build research assistants, email triage agents

Module 2: Agentic RAG & Intelligent Retrieval
 - Self-RAG and corrective RAG
- Hybrid search and reranking
- Multi-source retrieval design
- Build enterprise knowledge assistants

Months 3–4: Multi-Agent Systems

Module 3: Multi-Agent Orchestration
 - Role-based agent teams
- LangGraph workflows
- Supervisor architectures
- Build content, research, and lead-qualification agents

Module 4: Advanced Application Patterns
 - Guardrails and validation
- Human-in-the-loop systems
- Escalation and fallback design
- Secure and production-safe agent patterns Month 5: AIOps & Intelligent Automation

Module 5: AIOps Fundamentals
 - Observability and tracing
- AI-powered log analysis
- Anomaly detection
- Automated incident response systems

Months 6–7: Deployment & Capstone

Module 6: Production Deployment
 - Dockerized agent systems
- CI/CD for AI applications
- Cost tracking and optimization

Module 7: Capstone Project
 - End-to-end agentic AI system
- Multi-agent + RAG + AIOps
- Live deployment and demo

Program Highlights
 - Build real-world autonomous AI agents
- Learn no-code → low-code → production pipelines
- Master agent orchestration + AIOps
- Graduate with a live agent portfolio

Learning Outcomes

Learners will be able to:
 - Design and orchestrate multi-agent systems
- Implement agentic RAG pipelines
- Deploy and monitor AI systems at scale
- Apply AIOps for reliability and cost control
- Build enterprise-ready AI applications

Eligibility Criteria
 - Education: B.Tech / B.E. / BCA / M.Sc. / MCA (50%+)
- Background: Basic programming or application development exposure
- AI Familiarity: Prior experience using AI tools preferred

Ideal For
 - Engineers and developers
- AI automation professionals
- Product managers with technical exposure
- Professionals building AI-driven workflows

Sales & Program Delivery

Academic oversight and certification are provided by I3C–IIT Jammu, while Futurense Technologies manages admissions, delivery, and learner support.

Admission Process

1. Online application

2. Pre-screening assessment

3. Application fee payment

4. Industry interview

5. Offer letter issuance

6. Fee payment & enrollment confirmation

Contact Details

Email: iitjmagenticaiops@futurense.com Phone: +91 92667 54756

Email I3C-IIT Jammu: info@i3c-iitjammu.in

nodes.text: भारतीय प्रौद्योगिकी संस्थान जम्मू को हिंदी में उत्कृष्ट कार्य करने के लिए राजभाषा विभाग, गृह मंत्रालय, भारत सरकार द्वारा नगर राजभाषा क्रियान्वयन समिति की 21 नवम्बर को भारतीय समवेत औषध संस्थान में संपन्न हुई द्वितीय अर्धवार्षिक बैठक में पुरस्कृत किया गया। नराकास के कुल 91 सदस्य कार्यालयों में से भारतीय प्रौद्योगिकी संस्थान जम्मू सहित 21 केंद्रीय कार्यालयों को इस पुरस्कार से सम्मानित किया गया। भारतीय प्रौद्योगिकी संस्थान जम्मू की तरफ से राजभाषा के नोडल अधिकारी का कार्य देख रहे सहायक प्राचार्य डॉक्टर श्रीशैलन चे द्वारा पुरस्कार प्राप्त किया गया। यह पुरस्कार कुमार पाल शर्मा, उप निदेशक, उत्तरी क्षेत्रीय कार्यान्वयन कार्यालय, गृह मंत्रालय, राजभाषा विभाग, दिल्ली द्वारा प्रदान किया गया। आज संस्थान के विभागीय राजभाषा समिति की चतुर्थ बैठक में नोडल अधिकारी द्वारा संस्थान के निदेशक महोदय को पुरस्कार के रूप में प्राप्त शील्ड प्रदान किया गया। इस अवसर पर हिंदी समिति के सदस्य डॉक्टर सरताज उल हसन, डॉ रविकांत सैनी, डॉ अम्बिका प्रसाद शाह, श्रीकृष्ण पारीक, संस्थान के हिंदी अधिकारी का अतिरिक्त कार्य देख रहे सहायक पुस्तकालयाध्यक्ष डॉ नीलेश कुमार सहित डॉ अमिताश ओझा भी मौजूद थे। [दिनांक 29 नवंबर 2022]

nodes.text:
आईआईटी जम्मू में राजभाषा हिंदी के प्रभावी एवं तकनीकी उपयोग को बढ़ावा देने की दिशा में एक महत्वपूर्ण कदम उठाया गया। 02 फरवरी 2026 को संस्थान में ‘हिंदी शब्द संसाधन एवं टंकण प्रशिक्षण सत्र (फरवरी–जुलाई 2026)’ का शुभारंभ किया गया।

हिंदी शिक्षण योजना (राजभाषा विभाग, गृह मंत्रालय) के तत्वावधान में आयोजित इस पाँच दिवसीय प्रशिक्षण कार्यक्रम का उद्देश्य प्रशासनिक कार्यों में हिंदी के सटीक, आत्मविश्वासी और आधुनिक प्रयोग को सुदृढ़ करना है। संस्थान के विभिन्न विभागों से चयनित कर्मचारियों को कंप्यूटर आधारित हिंदी टंकण एवं शब्द संसाधन का व्यावहारिक प्रशिक्षण प्रदान किया जा रहा है।

उद्घाटन सत्र में मुख्य अतिथि एवं विषय विशेषज्ञ श्री संतोष कुमार (सहायक निदेशक, हिंदी शिक्षण योजना, जम्मू) ने प्रशासनिक कार्यों में हिंदी टंकण की बढ़ती आवश्यकता पर प्रकाश डाला। हिंदी प्रकोष्ठ के नोडल अधिकारी डॉ. श्रीशैलन सी. ने स्वागत उद्बोधन प्रस्तुत किया। कार्यक्रम का संचालन श्री शुभांकर शर्मा द्वारा किया गया तथा सह-संयोजक डॉ. निलेश कुमार ने धन्यवाद ज्ञापन दिया।

यह प्रशिक्षण कार्यक्रम तकनीक के माध्यम से राजभाषा हिंदी को कार्यालयी कार्यप्रणाली की मुख्यधारा में सशक्त रूप से स्थापित करने की दिशा में एक सराहनीय पहल है।

nodes.title: Institute Ethics Committee (IEC) of IIT Jammu
nodes.summary: The Insitute Ethics Committee of IIT-Jammu is an independent committee under the Dean, Research and Consultancy. The IEC, IIT-Jammu, is responsible for the scrutiny and approval of all research projects in IIT-Jammu involving human subjects.

nodes.title: Introduction
nodes.summary: The Insitute Ethics Committee of IIT-Jammu is an independent committee under the Dean, Research and Consultancy. The IEC, IIT-Jammu, is responsible for the scrutiny and approval of all research projects in IIT-Jammu involving human subjects.
nodes.text: The Insitute Ethics Committee of IIT-Jammu is an independent committee under the Dean, Research and Consultancy. The IEC, IIT-Jammu, is responsible for the scrutiny and approval of all research projects in IIT-Jammu involving human subjects. It is responsible for ensuring that ethical principles are followed in the collection of experimental data, and the analysis of such data. It will also ensure the maintenance of security and confidentiality of subject data, and in all ways ensuring that the rights of human research subjects are always protected.

nodes.text:

- Benefits for IIT Jammu Students

About TOEFL

Test of English as a Foreign Language (TOEFL) is a standardized test to measure the English language ability of non-native speakers wishing to enrol in English-speaking universities. More than 35 million people worldwide have chosen the TOEFL test to demonstrate their English-language proficiency. The test is accepted by more than 11,500 universities and other institutions in over 160 countries, including Australia, Canada, New Zealand, the United States, the U.K., and across Europe and Asia.

TOEFL is a trademark of the Educational Testing Service (ETS), a private non-profit organization, which designs and administers tests. The test is conveniently offered via 3 testing options:
 - TOEFL iBT test in a test center
- TOEFL iBT Home Edition
- TOEFL iBT Paper Edition

Broadly speaking, the TOEFL measures all four academic English skills - reading, listening, speaking, and writing, the way they are actually used in a classroom. TOEFL official score reports are sent independently to institutions and are valid for two years following the test.

The TOEFL iBT test contains 100% academic content with integrated tasks that require test takers to combine their skills, just as they do in an actual classroom. Students may read a passage and listen to a lecture, assimilate what they have learned, and then speak or write a response.

About GRE®

The Graduate Record Examinations (GRE) is a standardized test that is an admissions requirement for hundreds of graduate schools in the United States, Canada and several other countries. The GRE is owned and administered by Educational Testing Service (ETS) for admissions to management, engineering, law and other streams of learning.

The GRE aims to measure verbal reasoning, quantitative reasoning, analytical writing, and critical thinking skills that have been acquired over a long period of learning. The content of the GRE consists of certain specific algebra, geometry, arithmetic, and vocabulary sections.

The GRE General Test is offered as a computer-based exam administered at testing centres and institution-owned or authorized by an approved service provider. In the graduate school admissions process, the level of emphasis that is placed on GRE scores varies widely between schools and departments within schools. The importance of a GRE score can range from being an admission formality to an important selection factor.

nodes.title: IIT Jammu
nodes.summary: Celebrating the Class of 2024: A Memorable Camping Trip! The Alumni Affairs Office at IIT Jammu recently organized a heartwarming camping trip for the graduating batch of 2024.
nodes.text:
Celebrating the Class of 2024: A Memorable Camping Trip!

The Alumni Affairs Office at IIT Jammu recently organized a heartwarming camping trip for the graduating batch of 2024. Aptly named "Camp Lungta," this excursion served as a warm welcome into the alumni fold, providing a perfect opportunity for the graduates to reminisce and create lasting memories.

Amidst the serene landscapes of Camp Lungta, located in the tranquil embrace of nature, the graduating batch found themselves immersed in joyous camaraderie. From laughter-filled campfire stories to adrenaline-pumping adventures, every moment was etched with the spirit of togetherness.

A Warm Welcome:

The Alumni Affairs Office extended a warm embrace to the passing-out batch, ensuring their transition from students to alumni was nothing short of extraordinary. The camping trip was more than just a recreational activity; it was a symbol of continuity, where graduates were reminded that they will forever remain an integral part of the IIT Jammu community.

Special Evenings, Special Memories:

To make the occasion even more memorable, the evenings were adorned with special events tailored to make the graduates feel cherished. From enchanting live musical performances that resonated through the woods to captivating local folk dance evenings that celebrated the rich cultural tapestry of the region, each event was meticulously crafted to evoke a sense of belonging and nostalgia.

Into the Heart of Nature:

One of the highlights of the trip was the trek to Lungta Waterfalls, a breathtaking adventure that took the graduates closer to nature's embrace. Amidst the cascading waters and lush greenery, they found solace and joy, culminating in an exhilarating plunge into the refreshing cold waters—a moment of pure bliss and liberation.

Looking Forward:

As the echoes of laughter and camaraderie fade into cherished memories, the Alumni Affairs Office eagerly looks forward to crafting more such enriching experiences for the alumni community. With each trip, they aim to strengthen the bonds that tie past, present, and future generations of IIT Jammu, fostering a legacy of unity and pride.

In the journey of life, the memories we create and the connections we forge are our most precious treasures. Through initiatives like the Camp Lungta camping trip, the Alumni Affairs Office ensures that the graduating batch of 2024 carries with them not just a degree but a lifetime of cherished moments and a community that will always be their home. Here's to the Class of 2024—a testament to the enduring spirit of IIT Jammu!

Link ( https://www.youtube.com/shorts/EfSg9svHNsI )

nodes.title: Incorporation of I3C: A section 8 not for profit company to promote startups of tomorrow
nodes.summary: Hence, we call I2EDC as Idea Factory of IIT Jammu. IIT Jammu's Incubation Unit "INSTITUTE INCUBATION & INNOVATION COUNCIL (I3C)-IIT JAMMU" is finally incorporated as Section-8 Company, on 18th March 2021, Thursday.
nodes.text:
Dear All,

Greetings From I2EDC (The Idea Factory IIT Jammu)

The Journey of this incorporated Incubation unit of IIT Jammu started in September 2020 with the formation of Institute Innovation and Entrepreneurship Development Centre (I2EDC) , The Idea Factory of IIT Jammu.

An innovation is something original, new, and important in whatever field that breaks into (or obtains a foothold in) a market or society. IIT Jammu seriously considered the formal inclusion of this activity into the academics and research initiatives covering as wide cross-section of faculty and students as possible. The institutionalisation of this process and its sustenance is a multipronged effort to create a core centre, the I2EDC.

The I2EDC is the pre-incubation cell of IIT Jammu, where industry-relevant ideas get converted into market-level products. Hence, we call I2EDC as Idea Factory of IIT Jammu. The I2EDC is well structured to process, identify, facilitate, develop, innovate, ideate, and pre-incubate with the involvement of all IIT Jammu stakeholders. Once Ideas are preincubated and ready to be launched in the market, then this incorporated Incubation Unit of IIT Jammu "INSTITUTE INCUBATION & INNOVATION COUNCIL (I3C)-IIT JAMMU" (A Section-8 Company) will help those pre-incubates to incubate their company through startup mode. Hence incorporation of this incubation unit was proposed. IIT Jammu's Incubation Unit "INSTITUTE INCUBATION & INNOVATION COUNCIL (I3C)-IIT JAMMU" is finally incorporated as Section-8 Company, on 18th March 2021, Thursday. Now, IIT Jammu Family startups may be launched in the Market under the banner of " INSTITUTE INCUBATION & INNOVATION COUNCIL (I3C)-IIT JAMMU". Now, This incubation unit will create a vibrant ecosystem comprising of mentors from its alumni network as well as alumni network from other IITs, strong support of Govt. funding agencies, investors, and technology expertise of its faculty community with proper handholding and mentorship.

On the behalf of Team I3C, I, Faculty Incharge, Institute Innovation and Entrepreneurship Development Centre (I2EDC), The Idea Factory of IIT Jammu, would like to thank the complete IIT Jammu Family, The Director IIT Jammu Prof. Manoj Singh Gaur, and  The Team I2EDC for there consistent support and inspiration. Special Thanks to Prof. Ashok Khanna for his support.
 - Click here to see the Brochure - I3C

nodes.title: MoU Signing between NTIPRIT DoT and IIT Jammu
nodes.summary: Jammu, July 21, 2024 – In a significant step towards bolstering India's cyber security capabilities, the National Telecommunications Institute for Policy Research, Innovation and Training (NTIPRIT), Department of Telecommunications (DoT), Government…
nodes.text:
Jammu, July 21, 2024 – In a significant step towards bolstering India's cyber security capabilities, the National Telecommunications Institute for Policy Research, Innovation and Training (NTIPRIT), Department of Telecommunications (DoT), Government of India, has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu) on 18th July 2024 in IMC theme launch event in Delhi, India. This collaboration aims to provide an extensive six-month hybrid training program for 30 selected officers from the Department of Telecommunications (DoT).

As India progresses in telecommunications and information technology, the demand for robust cyber security measures has become paramount. Recognizing this need, NTIPRIT and DoT have initiated a comprehensive program focused on core technical training and expertise in cyber security. The program will involve leading institutions and industry experts to equip officers with advanced knowledge and skills in this critical domain of cyber security.

The training program, designed to be both in-campus and online, will be conducted by IIT Jammu in collaboration with partner institutions renowned for their expertise in cyber security including DSCI, GMR Aero Academy, Quick Heal Technologies, COMPTIA, EC Council, ISC2 partners and NIIT University. This initiative is expected to create a cadre of highly skilled cyber security professionals who will not only safeguard India's digital infrastructure but also train others, gradually building a strong network of cyber experts across the nation.

The MoU was signed during Indian Mobile Congress 2024 theme launch event in Delhi in the presence of Shri. Jyotiraditya Scindia, Minister of Communications, Dr. Neeraj Mittal, Secretary DoT along with Mr. Deb Kumar Chakrabarti DG NTIPRIT, Mr. Atul Sinha, DDG NTIPRIT and Prof Kannan Iyer, Dean Academics IIT Jammu and Dr. Gaurav Varshney, Faculty at IIT Jammu.

Dr. Gaurav Varshney who is a faculty in the department of CSE and has 10+ years of experience in the domain of Cyber Security will be the project coordinator for this Competency Development Programme in Cyber Security at IIT Jammu.

The collaboration between IIT Jammu and NTIPRIT, DoT is a testament to India's commitment to advancing its cyber security capabilities and preparing for future challenges in the digital realm.

nodes.title: IIT Jammu
nodes.summary: All communication related to tenders is conducted solely through the Institute’s official email i.e., procurement@iitjammu.ac.in IIT Jammu does not communicate or solicit any information or payments related to tenders via WhatsApp, phone calls,…
nodes.text:
Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu) does not charge any fee in connection with tenders, except for the Earnest Money Deposit (EMD) and the Performance Bank Guarantee (PBG), as explicitly stated in the official tender documents. All communication related to tenders is conducted solely through the Institute’s official email i.e., procurement@iitjammu.ac.in

IIT Jammu does not communicate or solicit any information or payments related to tenders via WhatsApp, phone calls, personal emails, or any other unofficial platforms. Any such communication should be considered unauthorized and potentially fraudulent. Stakeholders are advised to remain vigilant and report any suspicious activity to the Institute immediately.

nodes.title: Team AgriZenix Wins IEEE YESIST12 2024 Prelims
nodes.summary: Team AgriZenix, from the Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Jammu, has clinched the top spot at the IEEE YESIST12 2024 Preliminary Round. The competition saw the participation of 35 teams from prominent universities and colleges such as MIET…
nodes.text:
Team AgriZenix, from the Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Jammu, has clinched the top spot at the IEEE YESIST12 2024 Preliminary Round. Comprised of dedicated students including Akanksha Saini, Harshit, Divyansh Mundra, and Rachit Bundiwal, under the mentorship of Dr Sudhakar Modem and Mr Atul Banotra, the team showcased their innovative prowess by developing a cutting-edge smart agriculture node as part of the TIH-IoT project.

The project, titled “Sustainable IoT System Design for Smart Agriculture” (TIH-IoT/2023-03/HRD/CHANAKYA/SL/CFP010A), focuses on harnessing advanced technology to monitor various agricultural parameters through integrated sensors. Central to their design is the utilization of a Raspberry Pi to execute machine learning algorithms, enabling real-time data analysis. Moreover, to facilitate remote monitoring, the team has developed a user-friendly website to access the sensor data effortlessly.

The competition saw the participation of 35 teams from prominent universities and colleges such as MIET Jammu, SKUAST Jammu, SMVDU Katra, and GCET Jammu, among others. Hosted at MIET Jammu on March 19, 2024, the event provided a platform for budding innovators to showcase their creations.

“We opted for the Maker Fair track due to our prototype's readiness, which proved to be advantageous,” remarked a team member, and added: “Presenting our project to an esteemed jury, including the Directors of MIET and SKAUST Jammu, was an enriching experience.” The jury's enthusiastic response validated the team's efforts, garnering interest from fellow participants and eliciting inquiries about their development process.

Looking ahead, the team anticipates the final showdown in Tunisia, North Africa. The prospect of networking with global professionals, innovators, and enthusiasts presents an unparalleled opportunity for knowledge exchange and collaboration. Grateful for the support received, Team AgriZenix extends heartfelt appreciation to the TIH-IoT team and Jain Irrigation for their invaluable guidance and financial assistance.
